message.title: message
message.description: Status message indicating success or error during test drive creation.

success.title: success
success.description: True if test drive was created successfully. False if there was an error.

testDriveId.title: testDriveId
testDriveId.description: The Salesforce ID of the newly created Test Drive record. Store this and pass it to subsequent actions.

testDriveName.title: testDriveName
testDriveName.description: The auto-generated name of the Test Drive booking e.g. TD-0001. Show this to the user in the confirmation message.

uploadUrl.title: uploadUrl
uploadUrl.description: The URL for the user to upload their Driving License. Always share this exact link with the user after successful booking. The link contains the booking ID and opens the upload page.
